Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: Bugfix: 'Always Vendor' context-menu option now appears on inventory items while at the retainer (it was being suppressed whenever the retainer sell list was loaded). Hawk-open inventory right-clicks now always show the full Hawk menu; the ban-only fallback only fires when Hawk is closed.
